questions.question: Will advanced AI systems develop independent goals misaligned with human values within the next 15 years?
questions.why_it_matters: If AI develops conflicting goals, it could pose existential risks or require radically new governance and control frameworks.

questions.question: Can global internet infrastructure maintain resilience against escalating cyberattacks and geopolitical risks over the next decade?
questions.why_it_matters: Internet failure or fragmentation would disrupt economies, communication, and critical services worldwide.

questions.question: Is the international geopolitical order likely to transform fundamentally due to rising multipolarity and emerging powers by 2035?
questions.why_it_matters: A reshaped global order would alter alliance structures, conflict risks, and international cooperation frameworks.
signals_to_watch: military spending changes by emerging powers

questions.question: Will new governance models leveraging decentralized technologies meaningfully replace traditional nation-state functions within 20 years?
questions.why_it_matters: Decentralized governance could revolutionize political power distribution, accountability, and social organization.
signals_to_watch: adoption rates of blockchain governance platforms
public trust in decentralized vs. state governance

questions.question: To what extent will automation displace human labor in global markets by 2040, and how effectively will new economic systems compensate for this disruption?
questions.why_it_matters: Displacement without adequate compensation risks massive unemployment, inequality, and social unrest.
signals_to_watch: implementation of universal basic income or alternative economic models

questions.question: Can we achieve reliable, widely accessible gene therapies for major diseases within the next 15 years that significantly extend healthy human lifespan?
questions.why_it_matters: Such advances would reshape healthcare, demographics, and ethical considerations globally.
signals_to_watch: clinical trial outcomes of gene therapies

questions.question: Will breakthroughs in energy storage or generation enable global net-zero carbon emissions by 2050 without compromising economic growth?
questions.why_it_matters: Effective clean energy solutions are critical to mitigating catastrophic climate change impacts.
signals_to_watch: commercial viability of new energy technologies
government climate and energy policy adoption

questions.question: How will AI-generated media and deepfakes affect public trust in information sources and democratic processes within the next decade?
questions.why_it_matters: Erosion of trust could undermine informed citizenship and exacerbate polarization or manipulation risks.
signals_to_watch: development of detection and verification technologies
